requirements.description: Sunita Agarwal is Client CEO responsible for vision, business decisions, and final approvals.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal

requirements.description: Rajesh Mehta is Client PM responsible for operational requirements, integrations, and technical decisions.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta

requirements.description: Arjun Shah is BA responsible for requirements elicitation and documentation.
requirements.speaker: Arjun Shah

requirements.description: Priya Nair is PM responsible for project delivery, integration planning, and timeline management.
requirements.speaker: Priya Nair

requirements.description: End customers browse, search, and purchase products on the platform.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal

requirements.description: Store managers view regional orders and manage returns via the platform.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal

requirements.description: Central admin team manages products, pricing, and promotions across the platform.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal

requirements.description: Vendor partners manage their own inventory and product listings via dedicated login.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal

requirements.description: Platform must go live within 6 months maximum from project start.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Platform is deployed and accessible to customers within 6 months of project kickoff.

requirements.description: System must support credit card, debit card, UPI, and net banking payment methods.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: All four payment methods are available and successfully process transactions at checkout.

requirements.description: System must support credit card EMI payment option at checkout.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Credit card EMI option is presented and processed successfully at checkout.

requirements.description: System must integrate with Bajaj Finance API to support no-cost EMI financing.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Bajaj Finance no-cost EMI option is available and completes transactions successfully.

requirements.description: Bajaj Finance API integration can proceed as agreement is already in place.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta

requirements.description: ZestMoney integration is pending partnership agreement; timeline is uncertain.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta

requirements.description: System must provide separate login and portal for vendor partners to manage listings.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Vendors can log in and manage inventory and product information independently.

requirements.description: System must allow store managers to view orders filtered by their region.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Store manager dashboard displays only orders associated with their assigned region.

requirements.description: System must allow store managers to manage product returns.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Store managers can initiate and process return requests from their portal.

requirements.description: Only RetailCorp central admin can set product prices; vendors cannot modify pricing.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Vendor portal has no price editing capability; price fields are read-only for vendors.

requirements.description: Vendors must be able to manage their own inventory quantities via the platform.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Vendors can update stock levels for their listed products in the vendor portal.

requirements.description: Vendors must be able to manage product information and descriptions for their listings.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Vendors can edit product titles, descriptions, images, and specifications in their portal.

requirements.description: Product catalog will scale from 8,000 current SKUs to approximately 25,000 with vendors.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta

requirements.description: System must integrate with SAP ERP to migrate and sync product catalog data.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Product data from SAP is successfully imported and visible in the platform catalog.

requirements.description: System must sync inventory levels with SAP ERP in real time.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Inventory changes in SAP are reflected on the platform within 60 seconds.

requirements.description: System must sync product information from SAP ERP via daily batch process.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Product information batch sync from SAP completes successfully once every 24 hours.

requirements.description: Platform must not display a product as available if it is out of stock in SAP.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Out-of-stock products are marked unavailable on the platform within the real-time sync window.

requirements.description: System must provide product search by product name, category, and brand.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Search returns relevant results when queried by product name, category, or brand.

requirements.description: System must support product filtering by price range, brand, ratings, and delivery time.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Customers can apply all four filter types and results update accordingly.

requirements.description: System must allow customers to submit product reviews and ratings.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Customers can submit a review and star rating on purchased products.

requirements.description: System must support admin moderation of customer reviews before they are published.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Reviews are not visible to customers until approved by an admin moderator.

requirements.description: Customer reviews must not go live without prior admin moderation and approval.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: No unmoderated review is publicly visible on any product page.

requirements.description: System must allow customers to save products to a wishlist for later purchase.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Customers can add products to wishlist and retrieve saved items in subsequent sessions.

requirements.description: System must integrate with Delhivery API for shipping rate calculation and order tracking.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Delhivery shipping rates are displayed at checkout and tracking data is available post-order.

requirements.description: System must provide real-time order tracking to customers directly within the platform.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Customers can view live shipment status on their order detail page without leaving the platform.

requirements.description: Platform must comply with GDPR regulations to support NRI customer data privacy.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Platform passes GDPR compliance audit covering consent, data access, and deletion rights.

requirements.description: Platform must comply with the Indian Information Technology Act.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Platform meets all applicable requirements under the Indian IT Act.

requirements.description: All customer data must be stored on servers physically located within India.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Infrastructure audit confirms all customer data storage is within Indian data centers.

requirements.description: Platform must handle a minimum of 50,000 concurrent users during peak sale events.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Load test confirms platform remains stable and functional at 50,000 concurrent users.

requirements.description: All platform pages must load within 3 seconds under normal and peak traffic conditions.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Performance test confirms 95th percentile page load time is under 3 seconds at peak load.

requirements.description: System must generate sales reports on daily, weekly, and monthly intervals.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Admin can generate and export sales reports for daily, weekly, and monthly periods.

requirements.description: Sales reports must be filterable by region, product category, and vendor.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Reports can be filtered independently by region, category, and vendor with accurate results.

requirements.description: System must provide cart abandonment analytics showing products viewed but not purchased.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Analytics dashboard displays cart abandonment rate and associated product-level data.

requirements.description: System must support sending promotional emails to customers.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Admin can create and send promotional email campaigns to customer segments.

requirements.description: A marketing tool or third-party integration will be required for email and SMS campaigns.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal

requirements.description: RetailCorp's existing SAP ERP contains clean, migratable product and inventory data.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta

requirements.description: Average order value of approximately 15,000 INR influences need for EMI payment options.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal

requirements.description: Platform must be scalable to support catalog growth from 8,000 to 25,000 SKUs.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Platform performs within SLA thresholds with a catalog of 25,000 active SKUs.

requirements.description: System must support central admin management of products, pricing, and promotions.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Central admin can create, update, and delete products, prices, and promotional offers.

requirements.description: Platform must support role-based access control for customers, store managers, admins, and vendors.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Each user role can only access features and data permitted for their role.

requirements.description: The system shall allow new customers to register using email or mobile number.
acceptance_criteria: Customer can successfully register with a valid email or mobile number and receive confirmation.

requirements.description: The system shall allow registered customers to log in via email/password or OTP.
acceptance_criteria: Customer can log in successfully using either email/password or a valid OTP.

requirements.description: The system shall allow customers to search products by name, brand, or category.
acceptance_criteria: Search returns relevant results when queried by product name, brand, or category.

requirements.description: The system shall allow customers to filter search results by price, brand, rating, and delivery time.
acceptance_criteria: Applying any filter updates search results to show only matching products.

requirements.description: The system shall display detailed product information including images, specs, price, and reviews.
acceptance_criteria: Product detail page shows images, description, specifications, price, and customer reviews.

requirements.description: The system shall allow customers to add one or more products to a shopping cart.
acceptance_criteria: Selected products appear in the cart with correct quantities and prices.

requirements.description: The system shall allow customers to add and select a delivery address during checkout.
acceptance_criteria: Customer can save a new address and select it as the delivery address before placing an order.

requirements.description: The system shall support payment via credit card, debit card, UPI, net banking, and EMI.
acceptance_criteria: Customer can complete a purchase using each of the five supported payment methods.

requirements.description: The system shall provide customers with real-time order tracking after purchase.
acceptance_criteria: Customer can view live shipment status and estimated delivery time for a placed order.

requirements.description: The system shall allow customers who purchased a product to submit a review and rating.
acceptance_criteria: Only verified purchasers can submit a rating and text review for a product.

requirements.description: The system shall allow central admins to approve or reject customer reviews before publication.
acceptance_criteria: A review is only visible to customers after an admin explicitly approves it.

requirements.description: The system shall allow central admins to add, edit, and deactivate products in the catalog.
acceptance_criteria: Admin can create a new product, update its details, and deactivate it so it no longer appears to customers.

requirements.description: The system shall allow central admins to set and update product prices and discounts.
acceptance_criteria: Updated price or discount is reflected on the product page immediately after admin saves changes.

requirements.description: The system shall sync inventory levels with SAP in real time to reflect accurate stock availability.
acceptance_criteria: Out-of-stock products are marked unavailable on the platform within 60 seconds of SAP inventory update.

requirements.description: The system shall allow vendors to create, update, and manage their own product listings.
acceptance_criteria: Vendor can add a new listing, edit product details, and changes are reflected on the platform after approval.

requirements.description: The system shall allow store managers to view all orders within their assigned region.
acceptance_criteria: Store manager dashboard displays only orders belonging to their designated region.

requirements.description: The system shall provide central admins with sales reports filterable by day, week, month, category, region, and vendor.
acceptance_criteria: Admin can generate and export a sales report for any supported time period and dimension combination.

requirements.description: The system shall report products added to cart but not purchased to central admins.
acceptance_criteria: Admin dashboard displays an abandoned-cart report listing products and abandonment counts.

requirements.description: The system shall allow central admins to send promotional campaigns to customers via email and SMS.
acceptance_criteria: Admin can create a campaign, select a customer segment, and successfully dispatch it via email and SMS.

requirements.description: The system shall provide a fully functional mobile application for Android and iOS platforms.
acceptance_criteria: Customer can browse, search, and complete a purchase on both Android and iOS mobile apps.

requirements.description: The system shall display key business metrics to executives via a mobile dashboard.
acceptance_criteria: Executive can view real-time KPIs including revenue, orders, and conversion rate on the mobile app.

requirements.description: The system shall allow customers to initiate a return request for a delivered product.
acceptance_criteria: Customer can submit a return request with reason, and the system acknowledges it with a return reference number.

glossary.ShopEase: The e-commerce platform being built for RetailCorp India Pvt. Ltd. to enable online retail operations
glossary.RetailCorp: The client organization, a mid-size Indian retail chain with approximately 200 physical stores selling home appliances, electronics, and furniture
glossary.SKU: Stock Keeping Unit; a unique identifier for each distinct product in the catalog, scaling from 8,000 to approximately 25,000
glossary.EMI: Equated Monthly Installment; a payment option allowing customers to pay for high-value purchases in fixed monthly installments
glossary.No-Cost EMI: An EMI arrangement where the interest is absorbed by the retailer or financing partner, offered via Bajaj Finance and ZestMoney
glossary.Bajaj Finance API: Third-party financing partner API to be integrated for no-cost EMI payment options at checkout
glossary.ZestMoney: A pending financing partner for no-cost EMI whose integration is contingent on a partnership agreement not yet finalized
glossary.Delhivery API: Third-party logistics provider API integrated for shipping rate calculation and real-time order tracking
glossary.SAP ERP: RetailCorp's existing enterprise resource planning system used as the source of truth for product catalog and inventory data
glossary.Vendor Portal: A dedicated login and interface allowing vendor partners to manage their own product listings and inventory quantities
glossary.Central Admin: RetailCorp's internal team with exclusive authority to manage products, pricing, and promotions across the platform
glossary.Cart Abandonment Analytics: Platform analytics tracking products that customers viewed or added to cart but did not purchase
glossary.Role-Based Access Control: A security model restricting platform features and data access based on a user's assigned role such as customer, vendor, store manager, or admin
glossary.NRI Customer: Non-Resident Indian customer whose data privacy requirements necessitate GDPR compliance alongside Indian IT Act compliance
glossary.Peak Sale Event: A high-traffic promotional period during which the platform must support a minimum of 50,000 concurrent users
